source.caption: Épure E 70 : projections d'un triangle ABC et du point S, avec les vraies grandeurs en traits mixtes.

notes: Monge épure with a VERTICAL ligne de terre: H-projection triangle drawn left (A^H,B^H,C^H,S^H), V-projection triangle right (A^V,B^V,C^V,S^V); each point's V and H reads pair via a horizontal recall line (shared y-ordinate).
Reads from the thick projection polygons + S recall-line endpoints. Ignored the 'vraies grandeurs en traits mixtes' (dashed A-S true-length constructions) per point_projection scope.
No point sits on the LT; groundLine placed cleanly between the two projections (x=397) — position only translates the lift.
